title: PCR Step 3 — Extension
summary: Third step of each techniques/pcr cycle. The temperature is raised to ~72 °C — the optimal temperature for the heat-stable enzymes/dna-polymerase (typically Taq polymerase from a thermophilic bacterium). Polymerase extends the bound primers in the 5' → 3' direction, synthesizing a new copy of the target strand. After extension, the cycle repeats — doubling the copies again.
